title: Transformers: Rescue Bots
synopsis: On the island of Griffin Rock, four Autobots—Heatwave, Chase, Boulder, and Blades—are assigned to work alongside the Burns family as a rescue team. Rather than fighting Decepticons, these Rescue Bots learn to protect and serve humans while adapting to life on Earth, facing natural disasters, rogue technology, and the schemes of the villainous Dr. Morocco.

episodes.title: Family of Heroes
episodes.synopsis: Four Autobots arrive on Griffin Rock and are partnered with the Burns family to serve as the island's new rescue team.

episodes.title: Under Pressure
episodes.synopsis: The Rescue Bots face an underwater emergency that tests their teamwork and courage.

episodes.title: Hotshots
episodes.synopsis: Heatwave and Kade compete over who is the better firefighter during a string of emergencies.

episodes.title: Flobsters on Parade
episodes.synopsis: Mutant lobster-like creatures called Flobsters invade Griffin Rock during a festival.

episodes.title: The Alien Invasion of Griffin Rock
episodes.synopsis: The town believes aliens are invading, but the real threat is a malfunctioning science experiment.

episodes.title: Walk on the Wild Side
episodes.synopsis: Animals across Griffin Rock begin behaving strangely due to a mysterious signal.

episodes.title: Cody on Patrol
episodes.synopsis: Young Cody Burns tries to prove he can be a real member of the rescue team.

episodes.title: Four Bots and a Baby
episodes.synopsis: The Rescue Bots must care for a baby while dealing with an emergency situation.

episodes.title: Christmas in July
episodes.synopsis: A weather machine malfunction brings winter weather to Griffin Rock in the middle of summer.

episodes.title: Deep Trouble
episodes.synopsis: The team investigates strange occurrences beneath the waters surrounding Griffin Rock.

episodes.title: Return of the Dino Bot
episodes.synopsis: A robotic dinosaur from Doc Greene's lab is reactivated and runs amok on the island.

episodes.title: The Other Doctor
episodes.synopsis: The nefarious Dr. Morocco arrives on Griffin Rock with seemingly benevolent inventions.

episodes.title: The Reign of Morocco
episodes.synopsis: Dr. Morocco's true intentions are revealed as he attempts to take control of Griffin Rock's technology.

episodes.title: Small Blessings
episodes.synopsis: A shrink ray accident causes the Rescue Bots to shrink down, forcing them to navigate a now-giant world.

episodes.title: The Griffin Rock Triangle
episodes.synopsis: Strange disappearances in the waters around Griffin Rock lead the team to investigate a local mystery.

episodes.title: Rules and Regulations
episodes.synopsis: Chase's obsession with following every rule to the letter causes problems during an emergency.

episodes.title: The Lost Bell
episodes.synopsis: The team searches for a historic bell that holds a secret about Griffin Rock's past.

episodes.title: Bumblebee to the Rescue
episodes.synopsis: Bumblebee visits Griffin Rock and helps the Rescue Bots deal with a particularly challenging situation.

episodes.title: You've Been Squilshed
episodes.synopsis: A giant squid-like creature threatens the island and the Rescue Bots must find a way to stop it.

episodes.title: Countdown
episodes.synopsis: The team races against time to prevent a disaster that could destroy all of Griffin Rock.

episodes.title: The Haunting of Griffin Rock
episodes.synopsis: Mysterious ghostly happenings on Griffin Rock turn out to have a technological explanation.

episodes.title: Little White Lies
episodes.synopsis: Cody learns a lesson about honesty when small fibs snowball into big problems.

episodes.title: Shake Up
episodes.synopsis: An earthquake threatens Griffin Rock and the team must work together to save the town.

episodes.title: Rescue Boy
episodes.synopsis: Cody gets a chance to prove himself as an official member of the rescue team.

episodes.title: It's a Bot Time
episodes.synopsis: A time-travel mishap sends Cody and the Rescue Bots into Griffin Rock's past.

episodes.title: Bot to the Future
episodes.synopsis: The time-travel adventure concludes as the team must find their way back to the present before history is permanently altered.

episodes.title: Road Trip
episodes.synopsis: The Burns family and Rescue Bots embark on a road trip that takes an unexpected turn.

episodes.title: Sky Forest
episodes.synopsis: A floating forest appears over Griffin Rock, creating a new set of rescue challenges.

episodes.title: Tip of the Iceberg
episodes.synopsis: An iceberg drifts toward Griffin Rock, threatening the island with freezing temperatures.

episodes.title: A Virtual Disaster
episodes.synopsis: The Rescue Bots get trapped inside a virtual reality simulation that starts malfunctioning.

episodes.title: Spellbound
episodes.synopsis: A mysterious artifact causes the people of Griffin Rock to fall under a hypnotic spell.

episodes.title: Prescott's Bots
episodes.synopsis: Reporter Huxley Prescott gets his own robot helpers that cause more problems than they solve.

episodes.title: Feed the Beast

episodes.synopsis: The team discovers hidden caverns beneath Griffin Rock that contain ancient secrets.

episodes.title: Space Bots

episodes.title: Changes
episodes.synopsis: The Rescue Bots receive new vehicle modes and must adjust to their upgraded forms.

episodes.synopsis: A winter festival brings unexpected dangers when mythological creatures seem to come to life.

episodes.synopsis: A runaway train threatens Griffin Rock and the team must stop it before it crashes.

episodes.synopsis: Dr. Morocco teams up with another villain, doubling the trouble for the Rescue Bots.

episodes.title: Rise of the Heroes

episodes.synopsis: A big-game hunter arrives on Griffin Rock with dangerous intentions for the local wildlife.

episodes.synopsis: A cloning accident creates multiple copies of Kade Burns, each more troublesome than the last.

episodes.title: Unfinished Business
episodes.synopsis: Dr. Morocco returns with unfinished plans that threaten the entire island.

episodes.title: No Place Like Dome
episodes.synopsis: A force field dome traps Griffin Rock, cutting it off from the outside world.

episodes.title: Bugs in the System
episodes.synopsis: Computer bugs infect Griffin Rock's technology, causing widespread system failures.

episodes.title: Switcheroo
episodes.synopsis: A body-swapping device causes the Rescue Bots and Burns family to switch minds.

episodes.title: Bot-Tastic Voyage
episodes.synopsis: The Rescue Bots are shrunk down and must navigate through the inner workings of a machine.

episodes.title: Quarry's Quarry
episodes.synopsis: Mining operations at a local quarry unearth something dangerous beneath Griffin Rock.

episodes.title: Did You See What I Thaw?
episodes.synopsis: A frozen prehistoric creature thaws out and runs loose on Griffin Rock.

episodes.title: The Attack of Humungado
episodes.synopsis: A giant monster attacks Griffin Rock and the Rescue Bots must find a way to stop it.

episodes.title: All Bots Great and Small
episodes.synopsis: The Rescue Bots must rescue animals of all sizes from various emergencies across the island.

episodes.title: Time After Time
episodes.synopsis: Another time-travel incident creates a time loop that the team must break free from.

episodes.title: Pirates Ahoy
episodes.synopsis: Real pirates invade Griffin Rock's waters, seeking hidden treasure on the island.

episodes.title: Turning the Tide
episodes.synopsis: Rising tides and coastal flooding threaten Griffin Rock, pushing the team to their limits.

episodes.title: The Last of Morocco
episodes.synopsis: Dr. Morocco launches his most ambitious scheme yet in what may be his final stand.

episodes.title: The New Recruits
episodes.synopsis: New Autobots arrive on Griffin Rock to join the rescue team, including Blurr and Salvage.

episodes.title: Rescue Bots Academy
episodes.synopsis: The idea of a Rescue Bot training academy is proposed, planting seeds for the future.

episodes.title: A New Hero
episodes.synopsis: A new hero emerges on Griffin Rock, but their methods may cause more harm than good.

episodes.title: Four-Legged Hero
episodes.synopsis: One of the Rescue Bots gains a beast mode, becoming a four-legged rescue animal.

episodes.title: Endangered Species
episodes.synopsis: The team must protect endangered animals that have been discovered on Griffin Rock.

episodes.title: More than Meets the Eye
episodes.synopsis: The Rescue Bots discover there is more to Griffin Rock than they ever realized.

episodes.title: I Have Heard the Robots Singing
episodes.synopsis: A musical phenomenon affects the Rescue Bots, causing them to burst into song.

episodes.title: Now and Then
episodes.synopsis: The team reflects on how far they have come while facing a new crisis.

episodes.title: Today and Forever
episodes.synopsis: The Season 3 finale brings the team together for an adventure that tests everything they have learned.

episodes.title: New Normal
episodes.synopsis: The Rescue Bots adjust to changes on Griffin Rock as new threats emerge.

episodes.title: Bridge Building
episodes.synopsis: The team must repair and protect a crucial bridge while handling multiple rescues.

episodes.title: Arrivals
episodes.synopsis: New arrivals on Griffin Rock bring both opportunities and new challenges.

episodes.title: Plus One
episodes.synopsis: An addition to the team shakes up the established dynamics of the Rescue Bots.

episodes.title: Back to Virtual Reality
episodes.synopsis: The team re-enters a virtual reality world, but this time the stakes are even higher.

episodes.title: Vanishing Returns
episodes.synopsis: People and objects across Griffin Rock start mysteriously vanishing.

episodes.title: Ghost in the Machine
episodes.synopsis: A digital ghost haunts Griffin Rock's computer systems, causing technological chaos.

episodes.title: Enemy of My Enemy
episodes.synopsis: An old enemy offers to help the Rescue Bots against an even greater threat.

episodes.title: Mayor May Not
episodes.synopsis: Griffin Rock's mayor gets involved in rescue operations with comical results.

episodes.title: All Spark Day
episodes.synopsis: The Rescue Bots celebrate a Cybertronian holiday while dealing with an emergency.

episodes.title: Part-Time Heroes
episodes.synopsis: The Burns family tries to take a day off, but emergencies keep pulling them back.

episodes.title: The More Things Change...
episodes.synopsis: Major changes come to Griffin Rock in the first part of a two-part story.

episodes.title: The More Things Stay the Same
episodes.synopsis: Despite the changes, the Rescue Bots learn that some things never change.

episodes.title: Hot Rod Bot
episodes.synopsis: Heatwave gains a hot rod vehicle mode and must learn to master his new form.

episodes.title: King Burns
episodes.synopsis: Chief Burns is treated like royalty in a medieval-themed emergency scenario.

episodes.title: Pizza Pi Party
episodes.synopsis: A pizza-related emergency spirals into a town-wide crisis.

episodes.title: Uninvited Guest
episodes.synopsis: An unwanted visitor on Griffin Rock creates problems for the entire team.

episodes.title: Camp Cody
episodes.synopsis: Cody goes to camp but ends up needing to rescue his fellow campers.

episodes.title: Once Upon a Time
episodes.synopsis: A fairy-tale themed adventure takes the Rescue Bots on a storybook journey.

episodes.title: The Need for Speed
episodes.synopsis: A speed-obsessed challenge pushes the Rescue Bots to their velocity limits.

episodes.title: Cody's 11
episodes.synopsis: Cody assembles a team for an elaborate plan to save Griffin Rock from danger.

episodes.title: To Infinity... And Back
episodes.synopsis: A space mission goes wrong and the Rescue Bots must find their way home.

episodes.title: Family Business
episodes.synopsis: The Burns family business is threatened while emergencies pile up.

episodes.title: A Brush with Danger
episodes.synopsis: Art comes to life on Griffin Rock, creating beautiful but dangerous situations.

episodes.title: Upgrades
episodes.synopsis: The Rescue Bots receive upgrades but must learn that technology is not always the answer.

episodes.title: Transformations
episodes.synopsis: In the series finale, the Rescue Bots and Burns family face their greatest challenge, cementing their bond as family and heroes forever.

facts: Rescue Bots is the longest-running Transformers cartoon ever produced with 104 half-hour episodes across four seasons.
The series uses Toon Boom Harmony 2D animation, distinguishing it from the CGI-animated Transformers: Prime which shared its continuity.
The show won a 2016 Daytime Emmy for Outstanding Performer in an Animated Program for Jeff Bennett.
Despite being aimed at younger viewers, Rescue Bots shares continuity with Transformers: Prime, featuring crossover appearances by Optimus Prime, Bumblebee, and other characters.
The series notably features no Decepticon villains, instead using human antagonists and science-gone-wrong scenarios.
The show originally aired on The Hub before the network rebranded as Discovery Family in late 2014.
Rescue Bots spawned a successor series, Rescue Bots Academy, which continued the franchise for younger audiences.
Mark Hamill guest-starred in the series, earning a 2017 Cynopsis Kids !magination Award for Best Guest Appearance.
